info.title: School Management System
info.description:
Backend API for the School Management System.

**Tenant isolation** is enforced by PostgreSQL Row-Level Security: the `school_id` claim in your JWT scopes every query. Cross-tenant reads return 404, never 403, so resource existence is never disclosed.

get.description: Return 200 whenever the process can serve HTTP. No dependency checks.

Verify downstream dependencies are reachable.

While DB_ENABLED is false the database is reported as `disabled` and the probe
still passes -- that is what allows the skeleton to run in CI and locally before
PostgreSQL is provisioned.

post.summary: Register a school and its first admin

get.description: Paginated directory of tenants for the Super Admin dashboard.

parameters.name: status_filter

schema.description: Filter schools by lifecycle status (e.g. pending_approval).
schema.title: Status Filter

parameters.description: Filter schools by lifecycle status (e.g. pending_approval).

post.description: Super-admin onboarding: provisions an already-active tenant.

get.description: Return the school the authenticated caller belongs to. RLS-scoped.

get.summary: Class and section summaries with headcounts
get.description: Dashboard view: every class, its sections, and students per section.

schema.title: Response Class Summaries Api V1 Classes Summary Get

get.summary: List the sections of a class

schema.title: Response List Sections Api V1 Classes  Class Id  Sections Get

post.summary: Add a section to a class

post.description:
Public endpoint backing the Next.js admissions form.

`PublicDbSession`, not `DbSession`: there is no caller identity. Declared before
`/{student_id}` so "admissions" is never parsed as a student id.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by enrollment status, e.g. `pending` for the admissions queue.
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by enrollment status, e.g. `pending` for the admissions queue.

delete.summary: Remove a student from the directory
delete.description: Soft delete -- fee, attendance and certificate history is preserved.

detail.title: Detail
detail.default: Application received. The school will contact you.

AdmissionResponse.title: AdmissionResponse
AdmissionResponse.description:
Deliberately thin. The public form must not echo back the stored record --
that would turn the endpoint into a way to probe another school's data.

ClassSummary.title: ClassSummary
ClassSummary.description:
A class with its sections and headcounts.

Serves the PDF's "Class & Section Summaries" dashboard: classes, their active
sections, and total student headcount per section. Assembled by the service from
one grouped COUNT query rather than N+1 per-section counts.

ClassUpdate.title: ClassUpdate
ClassUpdate.description:
All fields optional -- PATCH semantics.

The service applies `model_dump(exclude_unset=True)`, so omitting a field leaves
it untouched rather than nulling it.

LoginResult.title: LoginResult
LoginResult.description:
Login is two-shaped: either tokens, or a 2FA challenge.

A single response model keeps the OpenAPI surface simple and lets the frontend
branch on `requires_2fa` rather than on HTTP status.

PageMeta.title: PageMeta
PageMeta.description: Pagination metadata; everything a table UI needs to render its controls.

RegisterRequest.title: RegisterRequest
RegisterRequest.description: Self-service signup: creates a pending school AND its first admin at once.

detail.title: Detail
detail.default: Registration received. Check your email for a verification code.

email.title: Email
email.description: Official school contact address (not a login).

logo_url.title: Logo Url
logo_url.description: Used on ID cards, certificates and vouchers.

SchoolCreate.title: SchoolCreate
SchoolCreate.description:
Super-admin onboarding of a school (goes live immediately).

Distinct from self-service registration (`auth.RegisterRequest`), which creates a
PENDING_APPROVAL school plus its first admin in one step and requires no existing
privileged caller.

SchoolRead.title: SchoolRead
SchoolRead.description: The full school representation returned to super admins and the school itself.

SchoolStatus.title: SchoolStatus
SchoolStatus.description:
Lifecycle of a tenant.

PENDING_APPROVAL is the landing state for self-service registration. The PDF
assigns school onboarding to the Super Admin, so a self-registered school is
NOT live until a platform administrator approves it. This is what stops anyone
with an email address from provisioning a tenant on your infrastructure.

SchoolUpdate.title: SchoolUpdate
SchoolUpdate.description:
Partial update. Every field optional so PATCH semantics are preserved.

`status` is intentionally absent: lifecycle transitions go through the explicit
`approve` / `suspend` endpoints so each one is a distinct, auditable action
rather than a silent field write.

SectionSummary.title: SectionSummary
SectionSummary.description: One section plus its live headcount, for the summaries dashboard.

school_id.title: School Id
school_id.description: Which school is being applied to.

StudentAdmissionRequest.title: StudentAdmissionRequest
StudentAdmissionRequest.description:
Public admissions form payload (PDF: "Digital Admissions Form").

Has no `admission_number`, no `section_id` and no `status`: an applicant cannot
assign themselves a roll number, place themselves in a class, or admit
themselves. The service generates the number and forces status to PENDING.

StudentCreate.title: StudentCreate
StudentCreate.description: Staff-facing creation: the student is enrolled immediately.

StudentStatus.title: StudentStatus
StudentStatus.description:
Enrollment lifecycle.

PENDING is what makes the PDF's "Digital Admissions Form" work: a public
application lands as PENDING and appears in an admissions queue, without ever
counting as an enrolled student or appearing in a class register.

StudentUpdate.title: StudentUpdate
StudentUpdate.description: PATCH: every field optional, omission means "leave unchanged".

SubscriptionPlan.title: SubscriptionPlan
SubscriptionPlan.description: SaaS tier. Drives the seat/student limits enforced by the tenancy service.

UserRead.title: UserRead
UserRead.description: The authenticated user's own profile. Never exposes the password hash.

UserRole.title: UserRole
UserRole.description:
RBAC roles.

The PDF specifies School Admin (full access) and Teacher (limited to assigned
classes); SUPER_ADMIN is the platform operator who onboards schools.

Kept deliberately flat. A full permission matrix (roles -> permissions tables)
is the right model once there are twelve roles, but at three it is indirection
with no payoff -- and premature abstraction here would slow every module that
follows.
